context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 urgent fixes verified: (1) Supervisor sees 'TOTAL EMPLOYEES: 12' on dashboard and can access /api/admin/users endpoint (server.py line 1118-1119 allows SUPERVISOR role), (2) Supervisor/MC Officer can see Approve/Reject buttons in submission detail dialog when status is 'Pending' (Submissions.js line 115 canApproveReject includes SUPERVISOR and MC_OFFICER), (3) PDF Bills upload dialog shows 'Upload PDF Bills (Single or Bulk)' title with 'Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple' hint (Bills.js lines 1265-1314). Test data: 14 submissions total with 11 Pending status available for testing approve/reject flow.
